name: College of Agriculture and Food Science (CAFS)
building_or_area: CAFS complex near A.G. Samonte Building, central main campus
description: UPLB's founding college (est. 1909 as UP College of Agriculture); agriculture and food science education and research.

name: College of Arts and Sciences (CAS)
description: UPLB's largest college, home of the basic sciences, humanities, and social sciences institutes.

name: College of Development Communication (CDC)
building_or_area: CDC building, central main campus beside CEM
description: Pioneer college of development communication in Asia.

name: College of Economics and Management (CEM)
description: College for economics, agricultural economics, and agribusiness management programs.

name: College of Engineering and Agro-Industrial Technology (CEAT)
description: Engineering college of UPLB (civil, chemical, electrical, industrial, agricultural and biosystems engineering).

name: College of Forestry and Natural Resources (CFNR)
building_or_area: Forestry (upper) campus, foothills of Mt. Makiling
description: Forestry and natural resources college on the upper campus; administers Makiling-related units.

name: College of Human Ecology (CHE)
description: College covering human ecology, nutrition, human and family development studies.

name: College of Public Affairs and Development (CPAf)
description: Graduate college for public affairs, governance, and rural development.

name: College of Veterinary Medicine (CVM)
description: The country's oldest veterinary school; runs the Veterinary Teaching Hospital.

name: UPLB Graduate School
building_or_area: Graduate School building, western main campus near UHS
description: Administers UPLB's masters and doctoral programs.

name: School of Environmental Science and Management (SESAM)
building_or_area: SESAM building, central main campus near IBS
description: Graduate school for interdisciplinary environmental science and management.

name: Institute of Biological Sciences (IBS)
building_or_area: IBS complex, CAS, central main campus
description: CAS institute for biology; largest institute in the university.

name: Institute of Chemistry (IC)
description: CAS institute for chemistry teaching and research.

name: Institute of Computer Science (ICS)
description: CAS institute for computer science; runs the BS Computer Science program.

name: Institute of Mathematical Sciences and Physics / New Mathematics Building
building_or_area: New Mathematics Building, CAS, central main campus
description: Home of mathematics instruction at UPLB.

name: Institute of Statistics (INSTAT)
description: CAS institute for statistics.

name: Institute of Physics (IoP)
description: CAS institute for physics.

name: Institute of Food Science and Technology (IFST)
building_or_area: IFST building, CAFS, southern main campus
description: CAFS institute for food science and technology.

name: Institute of Animal Science (IAS)
building_or_area: F.M. Fronda Hall, B.M. Gonzales Animal Science Complex, southern main campus
description: CAFS institute for animal science.

name: Institute of Crop Science (ICropS)
building_or_area: Nemesio B. Mendiola Hall, southern main campus
description: CAFS institute for crop science.

name: Institute of Human Nutrition and Food (IHNF)
building_or_area: IHNF building, CHE, central main campus
description: CHE institute for nutrition and food studies.

name: Institute of Cooperatives and Bio-Enterprise Development (ICOPED)
building_or_area: ICOPED building, CEM, central main campus
description: CEM institute for cooperatives and bio-enterprise development.

name: Institute of Renewable Natural Resources (IRNR)
description: CFNR institute for renewable natural resources.

name: Department of Social Forestry and Forest Governance
description: CFNR department for social forestry and forest governance.

name: Department of Basic Veterinary Sciences
description: CVM department for basic veterinary sciences.

name: Department of Veterinary Paraclinical Sciences
description: CVM department for veterinary paraclinical sciences.

name: Institute of Plant Breeding (IPB)
building_or_area: Eastern campus research area near BIOTECH
description: CAFS research institute for crop improvement and plant breeding.

name: BIOTECH (National Institute of Molecular Biology and Biotechnology)
description: National research institute for molecular biology and biotechnology under OVCRE.

name: National Crop Protection Center (NCPC)
description: National research center for crop protection under CAFS.

name: Postharvest Horticulture Training and Research Center (PHTRC)
description: CAFS center for postharvest horticulture research and training.

name: Agricultural Machinery Testing and Evaluation Center (AMTEC)
description: CEAT center that tests and evaluates agricultural machinery.

name: Dairy Training and Research Institute (DTRI)
description: CAFS institute for dairy production research and training; famous for its Dairy Bar products.

name: Makiling Center for Mountain Ecosystems (MCME)
building_or_area: Forestry (upper) campus, base of Mt. Makiling
description: CFNR unit managing the Mount Makiling Forest Reserve; issues trail permits.

name: UPLB Museum of Natural History (MNH)
building_or_area: Forestry (upper) campus, foothills of Mt. Makiling
description: Natural history museum (est. 1976) showcasing Philippine flora and fauna collections.

name: Veterinary Teaching Hospital (VTH)
building_or_area: College of Veterinary Medicine complex, southern main campus
description: CVM's animal hospital offering clinical services to the public.

name: Veterinary Pathology Resource Facility (VPRF)
description: CVM facility for veterinary pathology diagnostics.

name: Philippine Carabao Center at UPLB
building_or_area: Animal Science complex, southern main campus
description: DA-attached carabao research center hosted at UPLB; sells fresh carabao milk products.

name: Philippine Rice Research Institute (PhilRice) Los Baños
building_or_area: PhilRice station, southeastern main campus near CEAT
description: DA rice research station co-located on the UPLB campus.

name: Ecosystems Research and Development Bureau (DENR-ERDB)
description: DENR research bureau headquartered on the Forestry campus.

name: International Rice Research Institute (IRRI)
building_or_area: IRRI headquarters campus, east of UPLB main campus
description: World's premier rice research organization, hosted on UPLB land since 1960.

name: Riceworld Museum (IRRI)
description: Museum on rice science and culture at IRRI headquarters.

name: SEARCA (Southeast Asian Regional Center for Graduate Study and Research in Agriculture)
building_or_area: SEARCA building, central main campus beside DL Umali Hall
description: Regional graduate study and agriculture research center hosted at UPLB.

name: UP Open University (UPOU)
building_or_area: UPOU headquarters, Brgy. Maahas, Los Baños
description: The UP System's distance-education university, headquartered near the UPLB campus.

name: Office of the Chancellor (OC)
building_or_area: 3/F Bienvenido M. Gonzalez Hall, main campus
description: Highest administrative office of UPLB.

name: Office of the Vice Chancellor for Academic Affairs (OVCAA)
building_or_area: 3/F Bienvenido M. Gonzalez Hall, main campus
description: Oversees curricula, instruction, and academic units.

name: Office of the Vice Chancellor for Administration (OVCA)
building_or_area: 3/F Bienvenido M. Gonzalez Hall, main campus
description: Handles administrative management: HR, procurement, records, supply.

name: Office of the Vice Chancellor for Community Affairs (OVCCA)
building_or_area: 3/F Bienvenido M. Gonzalez Hall, main campus
description: Oversees housing, security, and community services.

name: Office of the Vice Chancellor for Planning and Development (OVCPD)
building_or_area: 3/F Bienvenido M. Gonzalez Hall, main campus
description: Oversees campus planning, maintenance, and development projects.

name: Office of the Vice Chancellor for Research and Extension (OVCRE)
building_or_area: 3/F Bienvenido M. Gonzalez Hall, main campus
description: Coordinates university research and extension programs.

name: Office of the Vice Chancellor for Student Affairs (OVCSA)
building_or_area: Room 2, 2/F Student Union Building, main campus
description: Oversees student services: activities, scholarships, housing, counseling.

name: Office of the Vice Chancellor for Innovation and Enterprise Management (OVCIEM)
description: Oversees technology transfer, business affairs, and enterprise units.

name: Office of the University Registrar (OUR)
building_or_area: G/F CAS Annex 1 Building, main campus
description: Handles registration, student records, transcripts, and admissions.

name: Office of Student Activities (OSA)
description: OVCSA unit handling student organizations and activities.

name: Student Disciplinary Tribunal (SDT)
description: OVCSA unit handling student disciplinary cases.

name: Office of Scholarships and Grants (OSG)
description: OVCSA unit administering scholarships and financial assistance.

name: Learning Resource Center (LRC)
building_or_area: LRC Learning Hub beside the Student Union Building
description: OVCSA unit providing study spaces and academic support services.

name: University Housing Office (UHO)
building_or_area: Near the dormitory area, southwestern main campus
description: OVCCA unit managing university housing and dormitories.

name: UPLB Gender Center
building_or_area: Near Graduate School, western main campus
description: OVCCA unit promoting gender equality and handling gender concerns.

name: Digital Innovation Center (DIC)
building_or_area: Near CAFS complex, central main campus
description: OVCPD unit for campus IT systems and digital services.

name: Office of Alumni Relations (OAR)
description: Office of the Chancellor unit for alumni affairs.

name: Office of International Linkages (OIL)
building_or_area: Near Graduate School, western main campus
description: Office of the Chancellor unit for international partnerships and exchange.

name: Ugnayan ng Pahinungod (Bahay ng Pahinungod)
building_or_area: Bahay ng Pahinungod, southwestern main campus
description: UPLB's official volunteer service arm.

name: UPLB Foundation, Inc. (UPLBFI)
building_or_area: UPLBFI Building beside the Student Union Building
description: Non-profit foundation supporting UPLB research and development projects.

name: University Library (Main Library)
building_or_area: Bienvenido M. Gonzalez Hall, main campus
description: UPLB's main library, housed in B.M. Gonzalez Hall.

name: University Health Service (UHS)
description: Campus hospital providing medical services to the UPLB community.

name: UPLB Post Office
building_or_area: Near Student Union Building, main campus
description: Campus post office.

name: University Bookstore
building_or_area: UPLBFI Building near the Student Union Building
description: Campus bookstore for school supplies and UPLB merchandise.

name: Church Among the Palms
description: Protestant church serving the campus community since the UPCA era.

name: Saint John Paul II Chapel and Pastoral Center
description: Catholic chapel and pastoral center serving the UPLB community.

name: Makiling Residence Hall
description: University dormitory on the Forestry campus.

name: Forestry Residence Hall
description: University dormitory on the Forestry campus.

name: New Forestry Residence Hall
description: University dormitory on the Forestry campus.

name: International House Residence Hall
building_or_area: Western main campus near Graduate School
description: University dormitory for international and graduate students.

name: New Dormitory Residence Hall
description: University dormitory near Copeland Gymnasium.

name: UPLB Oblation (Oblation Park)
building_or_area: Oblation Park fronting B.M. Gonzalez Hall
description: UPLB's Oblation statue, the UP System's iconic symbol of selfless offering.

name: Carabao Park (UPCA Alumni Plaza)
building_or_area: In front of the CAFS/Agriculture area, central main campus
description: Plaza with carabao head sculptures; popular gathering and picture spot.

name: Freedom Park (D.L. Umali Freedom Park)
building_or_area: Central main campus, along the academic oval
description: Large open field used for gatherings, sports, and university events.

name: Fertility Tree
building_or_area: Campus oval area between Freedom Park and UPLB Alumni Plaza
description: Old rubber tree steeped in campus folklore about couples who pass beneath it.

name: Dioscoro L. Umali Hall
description: UPLB's main auditorium and theater, designed by National Artist Leandro Locsin.

name: Charles Fuller Baker Memorial Hall
building_or_area: Along the campus oval near Freedom Park
description: Historic gymnasium-auditorium; served as a WWII internment camp site.

name: Edwin B. Copeland Gymnasium
description: UPLB's main gymnasium for sports and large events.

name: Student Union Building (SU)
building_or_area: Central main campus near the Post Office
description: Locsin-designed student center housing OVCSA offices, USC, student publications, and food stalls.

name: Obdulia F. Sison Hall
building_or_area: Southwestern main campus near the dormitory area
description: Locsin-designed hall, formerly the Continuing Education Center.

name: UPLB Carillon Tower
building_or_area: Campus oval area near UPLB Alumni Plaza
description: Bell tower landmark on the main campus oval.

name: UPLB Academic Heritage Tower
building_or_area: Near Carabao Park, central main campus
description: Monument tower commemorating UPLB's academic heritage.

name: UPLB Alumni Plaza
building_or_area: Campus oval area near the Carillon Tower
description: Plaza honoring UPLB alumni.

name: Seniors' Social Garden
building_or_area: Between Freedom Park and the Mathematics Building
description: Garden donated by graduating classes; venue for socials and hangouts.

name: UPLB Centennial Tree Park
building_or_area: Western main campus near the Graduate School
description: Tree park established for the UP centennial.

name: UPLB Sculpture Garden
building_or_area: Campus oval area near UPLB Alumni Plaza
description: Outdoor garden of sculptures on the main campus.

name: Hortorium
description: Botanical garden and plant collection area of the university.

name: UPLB Grandstand
description: Grandstand facing Freedom Park, used during university events.

name: UPLB Founding Site
building_or_area: Near Los Baños town center, Brgy. Baybayin area
description: Commemorative marker at the original 1909 founding site of the UP College of Agriculture.

name: Abelardo G. Samonte Building
description: Locsin-designed former administration building, now used by the agriculture college offices.

name: Bienvenido M. Gonzalez Hall
building_or_area: Central main campus fronting Oblation Park
description: Main administration building; houses the Office of the Chancellor, VC offices, and the Main Library.

name: Mount Makiling
description: Dormant volcano and legendary mountain overlooking UPLB; popular hiking destination.

name: Mount Makiling Forest Reserve
description: 4,000+ hectare forest reserve managed by UPLB as a research and conservation area.

name: Makiling Botanic Gardens (MBG)
description: Botanic gardens with forest trails, swimming spots, and picnic areas under CFNR.

name: Mud Springs
building_or_area: Mt. Makiling trail, Makiling Forest Reserve
description: Bubbling geothermal mud pool along the Mt. Makiling hiking trail.

name: Flat Rocks
description: Rocky creek-side rest stop along the lower Makiling trail; popular picnic spot.

name: Mount Makiling Peak 2
description: Highest accessible peak of Mt. Makiling, endpoint of the UPLB hiking trail.

name: Maria Makiling Trail Station 1 (trailhead)
description: First station of the Maria Makiling hiking trail up the mountain.

name: Molawin River Natural Pool
description: Natural swimming pool on the Molawin River inside the botanic gardens.

name: Pook ni Maria Makiling
building_or_area: Upper campus along the road to Makiling
description: Recreation and lodging site with a swimming pool on the slopes of Mt. Makiling.

name: Makiling Rainforest Park - Central Nursery
building_or_area: Makiling Forest Reserve, along the summit trail
description: Rainforest park and nursery station within the forest reserve.

name: Makiling National Scout Reservation
building_or_area: Upper campus area, adjacent to the forest reserve
description: Boy Scouts of the Philippines camping reservation on Makiling's slopes; site of the 1959 World Jamboree.

name: UPLB-EDC Binhi Biodiversity Park
description: Native-tree biodiversity park established with the Energy Development Corporation.

name: CFNR Alumni Forest and Nature Park
description: Forest park maintained by CFNR alumni.

name: DTRI Dairy Bar
description: Iconic campus stop for fresh milk, cheese, and ice cream from the dairy institute.

name: Student Union Canteen
description: Food stalls inside the Student Union Building.

name: But First, Coffee
description: Popular student cafe just outside campus.

name: Aling Glo's Restaurant
description: Budget eatery popular with students.

name: R.M. Cadapan's Canteen
description: Long-standing budget canteen near campus.

name: Vega Centre
description: Commercial arcade with food stalls and services frequented by students.

name: IRRI Cafeteria
description: Cafeteria at IRRI headquarters, open to visitors.

name: SEARCA Canteen
description: Canteen at the SEARCA building.

name: Vraja Cuisine - Vegetarian and Vegan Cafe
building_or_area: Campus oval area near UPLB Alumni Plaza
description: Vegetarian and vegan cafe near the campus oval.

name: Black And Brew Cafe
description: Coffee shop near the Vega Centre strip.

name: SNODLOB UPLB - Jubileeville stop
building_or_area: Near CAFS complex, central main campus
description: Bus/jeepney stop on campus for the Jubileeville route.

name: Makiling Botanic Gardens Bus Parking
description: Bus and visitor parking at the Makiling Botanic Gardens entrance.

name: UPLB University Student Council (USC)
description: The highest student governing body of UPLB.

name: UPLB Perspective
description: The official student publication of UPLB.

name: UPLB DevComSoc (tambayan)
description: Development Communication Society of UPLB; tambayan at the CDC grounds.

name: UPLB Babaylan
description: LGBTQ+ student organization of UPLB.
